stages.detail: MoveNet SinglePose Lightning is vendored as same-origin static assets before release.
stages.label: Build-time vendoring
stages.nextAction: Refresh assets only when the model version changes.

stages.detail: The exported app serves /models/movenet/singlepose/lightning/4/model.json and weight shards from the app origin.
stages.label: App delivery
stages.nextAction: Deploy the exported PWA after static asset checks pass.

stages.detail: Service-worker cache versioning is derived from app shell, metadata, exported assets, and static model assets.
stages.label: Asset versioning
stages.nextAction: Rerun export, PWA check, and web smoke whenever the model graph or weight shards change.

stages.detail: The exported PWA delivery path verifies service-worker model caching; each installed browser still downloads assets on first online launch or explicit warmup.
stages.label: First online launch
stages.nextAction: Keep web smoke and PWA readiness evidence fresh after model or service-worker changes.

stages.detail: Offline reuse is verified as an app delivery path; each browser must warm and keep model assets cached before offline analysis.
stages.label: Offline reuse
stages.nextAction: Warm the model cache online on each target browser before offline gym use.

summary.downloadTrigger: The model is vendored during build, then the service worker downloads same-origin model assets on first online install or explicit warmup.
summary.nextAction: Model delivery path is verified; warm the model cache on each target browser before offline gym use.
summary.updateTrigger: Model updates ship with a new static deploy; the content-addressed service-worker cache version invalidates old app and model assets.
